div.span:
Removed OS check
Valorant can't run on any OS other than Windows, so having an OS check is pointless

div.div: Commented on #1 Will I get banned?

no I don't have another hacks I just tried this one and got banned and I'm looking for a wall hack
I see. I'm sorry about the ban, thanks for reporting 👍
Commented on #1 is it still working?
Interesting. While we can't verify if this particular cheat got you banned (as you seem to have experience with other cheats), you are the first to report a ban on this repo! 🏆
